articles.title: Sooryavanshi, Archer Demolish CSK: IPL 2025 Highlights
articles.what_this_means: CSK crumbled to 127 all out in a devastating IPL 2025 loss as Sooryavanshi, Archer, and Burger dismantled the new-look lineup. This comprehensive bowling display is a major turning point in the tournament, and Indian fans in the US can catch full replays on Willow TV and ESPN+.

articles.title: Salman Khan & Nayanthara Team Up for First Time in 2026
articles.what_this_means: Bollywood megastars Salman Khan and Nayanthara are collaborating for the first time in director Vamshi Paidipally's upcoming action drama. The project, produced by Dil Raju, will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Disney+ Hotstar after its theatrical run—major news for Indian diaspora seeking new Hindi cinema in 2026.

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer & Gill Return: PBKS vs GT T20 2026
articles.what_this_means: Shreyas Iyer and Shubman Gill are back in focus as Punjab Kings and Gujarat Titans—two IPL 2025 playoff teams—clash in a critical T20 battle. Both captains need big performances to restore their T20 form. US cricket fans can watch live on Willow TV, ESPN+, or stream highlights next day on YouTube.

articles.title: India vs Australia Test 2026: Green Backed for Long-Term Role
articles.what_this_means: Cameron Green gets continued backing from Australia despite his lean Ashes performance, signaling he'll be part of the India vs Australia Test series in August 2026. For NRIBeat readers, this means another redemption arc storyline to follow while catching India cricket matches from the US—here's how to watch live without missing sleep.

articles.title: Pretext: The Open Source Web Design Standard That Changes Dev Jobs [2026]
articles.what_this_means: Pretext, a new open-source web standard, eliminates the 30-year layout reflow bottleneck that slows down modern web apps. For Indian engineers at US tech companies, adopting Pretext now is a career accelerator—it improves code performance, integrates seamlessly with AI tools for developers, and will become a required skill within 2-3 years.
